tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,12): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,12): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'E'.
tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,14): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(2,5): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(2,5): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(3,1): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.


==== tluaConstEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua (6 errors) ====
    local enum E {
               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
               ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'E'.
                 ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
        A,
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
        ~
!!! error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
    }
    ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
